title: Flash Sale Scaling
description: A high-traffic flash sale is coming! Your application server is currently connected directly to the database. Add a Load Balancer and a Cache to handle 2,000 requests per second.
objectives: Add a Load Balancer between Client and App Server
Add a Cache connected to the App Server
Successfully handle 2,000 RPS simulation without bottlenecks

title: Global Latency
description: Users are reporting slow load times from the other side of the world. Add a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to serve static assets.
objectives: Wait for users to report latency issues
Deploy a CDN to the edge

title: Real-Time Chat Scaling
description: Your chat app is blowing up! Users are losing messages when the servers are under heavy load. Implement a Message Queue to improve reliability and decoupling.
objectives: Wait for peak traffic to see message drops

title: News Feed Optimization
description: Celebrities with millions of followers are breaking your write-time fanout. You need to implement a more efficient feed strategy for high-fanout users.
objectives: Decide on a push-vs-pull strategy for hot users
Ensure the Feed Shard handles the load

title: The Double Spend Problem
description: Concurrent transactions are causing race conditions and negative balances. Implement a distributed coordination mechanism to ensure transaction integrity.
objectives: Deploy a distributed lock or consensus service
